reason_summary: The paper measures individual-level boundary spanning (owner/operator's interpersonal contacts and hours with external constituencies) and provides a raw zero-order correlation matrix (Table 1). It is not measuring firm-level alliances, nor is it a student sample.
verbatim: Subjects were asked to record the number of hours and the number of contacts they had in an average week with each of nine categories of environmental constituencies... The sum of the hours spent in these activities divided by the number of hours worked per week is a measure of how intensive the owner/operator's boundary spanning activity is
